title: FancyCraft
description: Featuring over 220 mods, including many ones for optimization, enchanting shaders, and stunning texture packs, this collection is designed to redefine your gameplay
body:
### **FancyCraft by Levitifox**

------------------------------


Immerse yourself in a captivating gaming experience with our vanilla-like modpack. Featuring **over 220 mods**, including many ones for **optimization**, enchanting **shaders**, and stunning **texture packs**, this collection is designed to redefine your gameplay. Explore a world filled with practical enhancements and a myriad of features that will elevate your gaming journey. Unleash the full potential of your game with our meticulously curated modpack.
